name: @jeswr/kernel-poc
description: Phase-X property-test harnesses (X0-X4) for the Kernel of Truth encoder v0. Pre-registered in docs/poc-design.md.

scripts.x0: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x0.js
scripts.x0:write: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x0.js --write
scripts.x1: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x1.js
scripts.x1:full: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x1.js --n 10000 --pairs full
scripts.x2: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x2.js
scripts.x3: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x3.js
scripts.x4: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x4.js
scripts.x:reduced: npm run x0 && npm run x1 && npm run x2 && npm run x3 && npm run x4
scripts.x1:corpus: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x1-corpus.js
scripts.x2:corpus: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x2-corpus.js
scripts.x3:corpus: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x3-corpus.js
scripts.x4:corpus: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x4-corpus.js
scripts.x:corpus: npm run x1:corpus && npm run x2:corpus && npm run x3:corpus && npm run x4:corpus
scripts.cert:q: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/qcert.js
scripts.x0:q: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x0-q.js
scripts.x0:q:write: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x0-q.js --write
scripts.x1:q: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x1-q.js
scripts.x2:q: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x2-q.js
scripts.x4:q: npm run corpus:build && nice -n 10 node dist-corpus/src/x4-q.js
scripts.x:q: npm run cert:q && npm run x0:q && npm run x1:q && npm run x2:q && npm run x4:q
scripts.scale:ingest: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/ingest.js
scripts.scale:typing: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/typing.js
scripts.scale:vec: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/vectorise.js
scripts.scale:vec:verify: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/vectorise.js --verify
scripts.scale:metrics: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node --max-old-space-size=3072 scale/dist/metrics.js
scripts.scale:census: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node --max-old-space-size=3072 scale/dist/census.js
scripts.scale:all: npm run scale:build && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/ingest.js && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/typing.js && nice -n 10 node scale/dist/vectorise.js && nice -n 10 node --max-old-space-size=3072 scale/dist/metrics.js
